badges.name: Thanks for coming to my Chuck E. Cheese's Place

source.name: Chuck E. Cheese's ( Closed 4/1/15 )
source.description:
Decisively closed on April 1st, 2015. This game was originally just a gamification of a now permanently closed store in real life. And i had no intention to make a functioning game out of it rather than a simple experience with additional "job" roleplaying aspects. Because this game no longer represents the former actual location, i have currently decided to have it remain inactive. I sincerely hope you enjoyed visiting my place in the past, i had garnered short-term success during a far simpler time on ROBLOX. Thank you!
• Employee uniform: http://www.roblox.com/CEC-item?id=71399083 
• Group: http://www.roblox.com/My/Groups.aspx?gid=864088 Disclaimer: Not all in-game objects can be interacted with, the reasoning for this is because i initially created the game with very minimal scripting knowledge, as my original concept was to only emphasize visually "accurate" details.

evidence.detail: badge resolves to universe 1665952 and root place 56634690
